# Warriors Arena

> Cairo's premier laser tag and gel blasters tactical gaming venue. Located inside Merryland Park, Heliopolis, Cairo. Exclusive private arena sessions — no sharing with other groups. Open nightly, 6 PM to 9 PM.

Warriors Arena offers high-energy tactical gameplay for groups of up to 6 players. All sessions are fully exclusive to the booking group. Online reservation available at warriorsarenabookings.online.

## Games

### Laser Tag
- 30-minute sessions: 150 EGP per person
- 60-minute sessions also available
- Brand-new tactical laser tag equipment
- Intensity: high

### Gel Blasters
- 30-minute sessions: 100 EGP per 400 bullets
- Gel ammunition-based tactical combat
- Coming soon: combined Laser + Gel mode

## Booking

Reservations are made online at https://warriorsarenabookings.online.

- Choose game type (Laser Tag or Gel Blasters)
- Select session duration
- Pick available date and time slot
- Enter group size (1–6 players max)
- Provide contact details and verify phone number
- Receive unique mission booking code instantly
- No online payment required — pay at the venue
- No account creation needed

Park entrance fee is NOT included in reservation:
- Regular days: 30 EGP per person
- Holidays and festivals: 50 EGP per person

## Special Missions

Warriors Arena periodically offers themed special mission scenarios — limited-time tactical experiences layered on top of the standard game. Check the booking system for currently active missions.

## Location

- Venue: Warriors Arena inside Merryland Park
- Area: Heliopolis, Cairo, Egypt
- Operating hours: Daily 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM (last slot at 8:30 PM)

## Contact

- WhatsApp: +20 122 655 7592
- Instagram: @warriors_arenaa
- Booking site: https://www.warriorsarenabookings.online

## Who this is for

- Groups of friends looking for an adrenaline activity in Cairo
- Birthday groups and celebrations
- Team outings and corporate events
- Families and youth groups (safe, controlled environment)
- Action sports and paintball enthusiasts

## Optional pages

- [Book a session](https://www.warriorsarenabookings.online/en/book)
- [Track your booking](https://www.warriorsarenabookings.online/en/track)
